heading: Rental value of parsonages
label: 107 Rental value of parsonages
notes: Amendments2002—Par. (2). inserted “and to the extent such allowance does not exceed the fair rental value of the home, including furnishings and appurtenances such as a garage, plus the cost of utilities” before period at end.Pub. L. 107–181

children.text: the rental value of a home furnished to him as part of his compensation; or

the rental allowance paid to him as part of his compensation, to the extent used by him to rent or provide a home and to the extent such allowance does not exceed the fair rental value of the home, including furnishings and appurtenances such as a garage, plus the cost of utilities.
